name: modernize
description: Replaces a library, framework, or component with a new one across a codebase via a 3-stage, document-driven pipeline. Single skill (`modernize`) that orchestrates: Stage 1 analyzes how the old component is used (code, build tooling, dynamic/string references, framework integrations) and writes a Usage Report; Stage 2 runs pre-flight compatibility checks and writes a Replacement Plan with an API mapping table and behavior-change column; Stage 3 executes the edits, sweeps for leftover references, verifies the build/tests, and writes a Replacement Report. Stage workflows live in internal reference files; no user-invokable sub-skills.
